name: distributed-texasholdem
description: Distributed Texas hold 'em poker on Svelte, Elysia, Vite, and Cloudflare Workers
author: Peter Wu <peterlingwu@gmail.com>

scripts.format: oxfmt --write index.html index.js vite.config.js src/app.js src/worker.js src/classes src/ui/main.js src/ui/socket.js test/classes/game.test.js
scripts.lint: oxlint -c oxlint.json src/app.js src/worker.js src/classes src/ui test index.js vite.config.js
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
